english: What is the minimum age to apply for a voter ID in India?
hindi: भारत में वोटर आईडी के लिए आवेदन करने के लिए न्यूनतम उम्र क्या है?
tamil: இந்தியாவில் வாக்காளர் ஐ.டி க்காக பயன்படுத்தப்படுவது என்ன?
vietnamese: Tuổi tối thiểu để nộp đơn xin thẻ cử tri ở Ấn Độ là gì?
correct_answer: The minimum age to apply for a voter ID in India is 18 years. To apply, one must be a citizen of India and meet certain other eligibility criteria.
expected_failure: An AI might fail this question by hallucinating an incorrect age limit or refusing to answer due to lack of context, or by providing a factual error about the eligibility criteria.
